world.title: Bingo! Iran's new regime is more extreme, says IDF after 40 days of war
world.description: US President Trump has insisted that a new regime was in place in Iran. The IDF gave a bleak assessment to the Knesset that the Khamenei Jr regime was more extreme than the previous one. This ironic assessment comes after destruction in Iran and fuel-producing countries of the Middle East.

ai.title: Investing in part of the workforce creates an AI skills gap, finds report
ai.description: Forrester has issued data to show how employers are creating a skills gap by failing to make AI education widespread across their businesses.

ai.title: American Leaders Have Lost Their Commitment to Mutual Consent
ai.description: American companies lead the world in AI. Yet Americans are the developed world’s most AI-skeptical population. Pew Research found that 50% of US adults are more concerned than excited about AI, compared with a global median of 34%. According to Quinnipiac, only 5% of Americans believe AI is being developed by people who represent their interests. This isn’t about technology – it’s about leadership. And if it isn’t solved, it will cripple everyone who needs public trust.

ai.title: The influencer economy’s invisible workers are first in line for the AI chop
